heading: Procedures encouraged where not required
label: 2106 Procedures encouraged where not required
text: It is the sense of Congress that an employer who is not required to comply with the notice requirements of should, to the extent possible, provide notice to its employees about a proposal to close a plant or permanently reduce its workforce.section 2102 of this title
notes: Effective DateSection effective 6 months after , see , set out as a note under .Aug. 4, 1988section 11 of Pub. L. 100–379section 2101 of this title
